title: Exact Finite Tensor Product Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite tensor-product bad bilinear map QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Left-additivity conflict where 10 + 01 = 11 and beta(10,1)+beta(01,1)=11, but the malformed row forces beta(11,1)=00.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite tensor rows only when they add distinct bilinearity, factorization, or finite-matrix solver pressure; keep arbitrary universal properties, multilinear algebra, and homological algebra in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite tensor-product, bilinear-map, and Kronecker-product rows as deterministic finite-function and finite-matrix obligations.
Replay bilinear laws, factorization through the tensor table, and finite matrix rows through Axeyum model evaluation.
Route bad finite bilinear-map left-additivity conflicts through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence once exact evaluation replay identifies the failing pair.
Keep general tensor products, universal properties over arbitrary modules, multilinear algebra, exterior/symmetric powers, and homological algebra under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
